mapper.select:
SELECT ID, WORK_TYPE_CODE, WORK_TYPE_NAME, CUSTOMER_NAME, SHIP_NAME, BERTH, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, REMARK, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, START_TIME, END_TIME, PLAN_NO, CARGO_NAME, LOAD_UNLOAD,WORK_AREA_NAME,EXAMINE_STATUS FROM T_WEIGHT_PLAN
id = #{id}

SELECT ID, WORK_TYPE_CODE, WORK_TYPE_NAME, CUSTOMER_NAME, SHIP_NAME, BERTH, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, REMARK, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, START_TIME, END_TIME, PLAN_NO, CARGO_NAME, LOAD_UNLOAD FROM T_WEIGHT_PLAN WHERE STATUS = '0'
SELECT count(PLAN_NO) from WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE PLAN_NO = #{planNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT count(PLAN_NO) from WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE PLAN_NO = #{planNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ID_NUMBER = #{idNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT count(*) from WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE PLAN_NO = #{planNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TRUCK_PLATE = #{truckNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_WEIGHT_PLAN( ID, WORK_TYPE_CODE, WORK_TYPE_NAME, CUSTOMER_NAME, SHIP_NAME, BERTH, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, REMARK, STATUS, START_TIME, END_TIME, PLAN_NO, CARGO_NAME, EXAMINE_STATUS, WORK_AREA_NAME, LOAD_UNLOAD, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, WEIGHT_TYPE )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workAreaName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loadUnload, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{weightType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
